title: Nippon Paint Store is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nippon Paint Store is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Nippon Paint Store are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nippon Paint Store:
Nippon Paint Store is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nippon Paint Store!
